nodes.x: It is necessary that ye should remain for the present time in your places of abode, as it shall be suitable to your circumstances.
1 IT is necessary that ye should remain for the present time in your places of abode, as it shall be suitable to your circumstances.

1. It is necessary that ye should remain for the present time in
 your places of abode, as it shall be suitable to your circumstances;
And inasmuch as ye have lands, ye shall impart to the eastern brethren;
And inasmuch as ye have not lands, let them buy for the present time in those regions round about, as seemeth them good, for it must needs be necessary that they have places to live for the present…

* It most needs be necessary, that ye save all the money that ye can, and that ye ob- tain all that ye can in righteousness, that In time ye may be enabled to purchase lands lor an inheritance, even the city. The place is not yet to be revealed, but after your brethren come from the east, there…

The place is not yet to be revealed; but after your brethren come from the east there are to be certain men appointed, and to them it shall be given to know the place, or to them it shall be revealed.
And they shall be appointed to purchase the lands, and to make a commencement to lay the foundation of the city; and then shall ye begin to be gathered with your families, every man according to his…
